title: LoKendGat's pvp modpack
description:
My PVP modpack inspired by MistView's pvp modpack!
Includes mods like essential, mod menu, apple skin, low fire reborn and many other PVP and optimization mods.
Useful if you want to fight a friend, or duel someone!
body:
My PVP modpack inspired by MistView's pvp modpack!
Includes mods like essential, mod menu, apple skin, low fire reborn and many other PVP and optimization mods.
Useful if you want to fight a friend, or duel someone!
Note:There is ReplayMod enabled by default to record your fights, disable it if you want!


Do you want to know the mods before downloading?Here's a list:

- Advanced Tool Stats
- Apple
- Skin 
- Axiom 
- Chat Heads 
- Cloth Config v26.1 
- Cubes Without Borders 
- EntityCulling 
- Fabric API 
- Fabric Language Kotlin 
- Gamma Utils 
- Inventory HUD + 
- Iris 
- Just Enough Items 
- Low Fire Reborn 
- Mod Menu 
- No Chat Reports 
- Numeral Ping 
- Placeholder API 
- PotionCounter 
- Remove Reloading Screen 
- Replay Mod 
- Shulker Box Tooltip 
- Sodium 
- Sodium Extra 
- WorldEdit 
- Xaero's Minimap 
- Xaero's World Map 
- YetAnotherConfigLib 
- essential-container 
- oωo 
- uku's Armor HUD 
- ukulib
More mods will be added!
